request: Part B: make plantuml_syntax_guard not spawn java by default. Default = advisory (no JVM): emit a one-line 'syntax not validated at write time; run /spec-lint' and allow. A new project.json knob plantuml.strict_syntax_check (default false) re-enables the current java -jar -checkonly behavior. Authoritative syntax validation stays in /spec-lint (on-demand, pre-approval). Constitutional: amend seed.md §4.1 (hook table row + lines 41,415) + CLAUDE.md Article VIII row, keeping src/seed.template.md and src/CLAUDE.template.md byte-mirrors in sync. Add the project.json knob (+ template). Update plantuml-syntax-guard-runtime tests.
